indication: SPRYCEL is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with Ph+ CML in chronic phase.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to dasatinib for the treatment of pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with Philadelphia chromosome-positive (Ph+) chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) in chronic phase.

document.name: Sprycel (dasatinib) [package insert]. FDA.
